title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
description: Harness the power of desire, faith, and organized planning to achieve any goal. 4 actionable Claude Code skills.
longDescription: Napoleon Hill's Think and Grow Rich distills two decades of research into the habits of the world's most successful people into thirteen principles of achievement. At its core, the book teaches that thoughts are things — a burning desire backed by faith, autosuggestion, specialized knowledge, and organized planning can transmute into physical reality. These four skills focus on the most actionable principles: defining your definite chief aim, programming your subconscious through autosuggestion, assembling a mastermind alliance, and overcoming procrastination through decisive action.
